prototype_surfaces.description: Thread-local batch buffer for owner push/pop, reducing lock acquisitions
prototype_surfaces.prototype_mechanism: Thread-local batch buffer with overflow flush to shared stack

prototype_surfaces.description: Bloom filter front-end for high-frequency duplicate wake absorption
prototype_surfaces.prototype_mechanism: Bloom filter check before lock acquisition, fallback on saturation

prototype_surfaces.description: Adaptive steal lookahead based on recent steal success rate
prototype_surfaces.incumbent_mechanism: Power of Two Choices with linear fallback scan
prototype_surfaces.prototype_mechanism: 2-4 adaptive candidates with EMA-based lookahead truncation

benchmark_dimensions.description: Local push/pop throughput with and without shard-local batch
Wake dedup throughput under varying duplicate rates
Steal latency distribution with adaptive lookahead
End-to-end task throughput under mixed workload

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify prototype surface catalog and fallback flag completeness
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa042 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_prototype_contract prototype_surface -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify fallback seam config defaults to incumbent behavior
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa042 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_prototype_contract fallback -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify benchmark dimension catalog and metrics
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa042 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_prototype_contract benchmark -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify functional invariants for local queue, waker, and steal path
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa042 cargo test --test kernel_fast_path_prototype_contract functional -- --nocapture
